candidates_evaluated.label: k67-orig-2 (primary — best SKU match)
candidates_evaluated.outcome: rejected — background worker overlaps the front-left silhouette (mirror arm / headlamp / bumper). Alpha analysis confirmed the person's pixels are entangled with the truck front-left across rows; no clean automated separation (manual-mask trigger).

candidates_evaluated.label: k6-1 (fallback — clean background)
candidates_evaluated.outcome: deferred — single-cab frame (compliant cabin, meeting founder's condition on the K6 post), clean street background, manufacturer domain. BUT it is a van-derived rounded-cab microtruck whose GVW/class cannot be verified against Serie K (4.3-6.3t); source calls it a '2-ton mini truck', likely at/below the low end. Staging it as Serie K risks a fabricated class claim.

notes: See deferred-row.md. kamaqc K67 = the verifiable K67B (correct family, traditional light-truck cab) but occluded; kamaauto.cn K6 = clean but class-doubtful. Neither yields a defensible clean hero.
